title: hypodematium pusillum
intro: Hypodematium pusillum, also known as the small maidenhair fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the family Hypodematidae. This plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine, particularly in the Indian subcontinent, due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Hypodematium pusillum include its ability to treat various ailments such as fever, digestive issues, and respiratory problems. In terms of herbal preparations, the plant is often used in the form of decoctions, infusions, and poultices, and its extracts can be found in various traditional medicine formulations.
